title: 首都キーウなどで4人死亡“ロシアは新型弾道ミサイルを使用”
snippet: ウクライナの首都キーウなどに、ロシアによる大規模な攻撃があり、4人の死亡が確認されました。ゼレンスキー大統領は、ロシアが新型の中距離弾道ミサイル「オレシュニク」を使用したとして、強く非難しました。

title: 中国 山西省の炭鉱で爆発事故 82人死亡 当局が責任者を拘束
snippet: 中国内陸部の山西省にある炭鉱で22日に起きた爆発事故では、82人が死亡し、128人が病院に搬送されて手当てを受けています。中国当局は炭鉱の責任者を拘束し、事故の原因などを徹底して調べるとしています。

snippet: 中国内陸部の山西省にある炭鉱で22日夜に爆発事故があり、国営メディアはこれまでに82人が死亡したと伝えました。現場では救助活動が続けられています。

title: APEC貿易相会合 “エネルギーなどの供給網の維持へ協力”
snippet: 中国で開かれていたAPEC＝アジア太平洋経済協力会議の貿易相会合は23日、緊迫が続く中東情勢を念頭に、エネルギーなどの重要物資について強じんなサプライチェーン＝供給網を維持するため各国が協力して取り組…

title: ゼレンスキー大統領「ロシアからことし590平方キロ解放」主張
snippet: ウクライナのゼレンスキー大統領は22日、ことしに入り、軍事侵攻を続けるロシアから590平方キロメートルを解放したと主張したうえで、反撃を強めるとともに、ロシア領内の石油施設などに対する無人機攻撃を続け…

title: Suspect killed after opening fire on Secret Service near White House
snippet: Officials say a suspect approached a checkpoint near the building and opened fire, and that a bystander was wounded.

title: Large-scale Russian attack on Ukraine leaves four dead and dozens injured
snippet: The Oreshnik missile, which reportedly travels over 10 times the speed of sound, was used, Russia has confirmed.

title: BBC at the site of China's worst mining disaster in more than a decade
snippet: At least 82 people have been killed after a gas explosion at the Liushenyu mine in China.

title: Blast targeting train kills at least 20 in Pakistan
snippet: Officials say the train had been transporting military personnel home for Eid when it was attacked by armed separatists.

title: Turkish riot police storm opposition offices after leaders ousted
snippet: Officers forced their way into the building days after the party vowed to defy a court ruling removing its leaders.

title: Man killed in shark attack off Australia's north-east coast
snippet: The 39-year-old was fatally injured at a shoal off the Cassowary Coast in Queensland, apparently while spearfishing.

title: One killed and many feared trapped under collapsed building in Philippines
snippet: A Malaysian man has died and about 20 people are feared trapped at the site near Manila, officials say.

title: Bolivian minister's convoy ambushed while overseeing roadblock clearance
snippet: Security forces were met by resistance while attempting to clear highway barriers, amid unrest over the government's economic policies.

title: California declares emergency as fire crews race to contain toxic leak
snippet: Thousands have been evacuated as officials warn a tank containing about 7,000 gallons of methyl methacrylate could explode.

title: Red Cross volunteers die from suspected Ebola in DR Congo
snippet: They are thought to have caught the virus before the outbreak was identified, the Red Cross says.

title: French mum and partner held until trial after sons abandoned by road in Portugal
snippet: The couple, who allegedly left the woman's sons on a roadside in southern Portugal, will remain in custody.

title: F1 great Prost 'injured as masked gang raid home'
snippet: Four-time Formula 1 world champion Alain Prost was injured when a masked gang raided his home near Geneva, Swiss media reports.

title: At least 82 killed in Chinese coal mine explosion
snippet: The blast in Shanxi province constitutes the country's worst mining disaster in 16 years.

title: Nascar champion Kyle Busch died of pneumonia and sepsis, family says
snippet: The driver died aged 41 on Thursday after "overwhelming complications" from the illnesses.

title: Rubio meets Modi during India visit with energy high on agenda
snippet: The secretary of state wants to sell US energy to Delhi to make up for shortfalls caused by the Iran war.

snippet: フィリピン北部で24日、建設中のビルが倒壊し、これまでに4人の死亡が確認されたほか、10人以上ががれきの下に閉じ込められており救助活動が続いています。

title: 【随時更新】ロシア ウクライナに軍事侵攻（5月25日の動き）
snippet: ロシアによるウクライナに対する軍事侵攻が続いています。ウクライナの各地でロシア軍とウクライナ軍が戦闘を続けていて、大勢の市民が国外へ避難しています。戦闘の状況や関係各国の外交など、ウクライナ情勢をめぐ…

title: 日中の閣僚接触「意思疎通が重要」 木原官房長官
snippet: 日中関係が悪化する中、赤澤経済産業大臣が中国の閣僚と接触したことについて、木原官房長官は、両国間に懸念や課題があるからこそ意思疎通が重要だとして、引き続き対話にはオープンな立場だと強調しました。

title: Rubio says 'solid' Iran deal may come on Monday
snippet: The deal under discussion would involve a 60-day ceasefire extension during which the Strait of Hormuz would be reopened, US media reports.

title: Oil prices slide on hopes of US-Iran peace deal
snippet: Trump said on Saturday that an agreement would include the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, without giving further details.

title: RAF jet carrying defence secretary has signal jammed near Russian border
snippet: Pilots on board had to use a different navigation system while the plane's GPS was disabled.

title: 沖縄 尖閣諸島沖 中国海警局の船2隻が日本の領海に侵入
snippet: 25日午後、沖縄県の尖閣諸島の沖合で中国海警局の船2隻が日本の領海に侵入しました。海上保安本部は、領海から直ちに出るよう警告と監視を続けています。

title: 中国 有人宇宙船打ち上げ成功 香港出身の宇宙飛行士初めて搭乗
snippet: 中国は日本時間の25日未明、有人宇宙船「神舟23号」の打ち上げに成功しました。初めて香港出身の宇宙飛行士が搭乗し、科学技術の分野でも一体化を印象づけた形です。

title: Anger grows after China's deadliest coal mining disaster in years
snippet: On China's tightly-controlled internet, people are calling for justice and questioning how this happened.

title: At least 19 people taken to hospital after 'strong smell' reported at Tokyo mall
snippet: Police say a man sprayed a substance at an ATM in the luxury Ginza 6 shopping centre.

title: First Hong Kong astronaut launches into space onboard Chinese mission
snippet: The 43-year-old police officer and mother of three serves as the team's payload scientist.

title: Clashes as Venezuelan prisoners protest over alleged mistreatment
snippet: The prisoners insisted their protest was peaceful but that security forces deployed to quell it opened fire.

title: Senegal's leadership row mounts as parliament speaker resigns
snippet: Some speculate that El Malick Ndiaye stepped down so that ousted-PM Ousmane Sonko can take his place.
